'''sachoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squaller|squaller]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squaller|squaller]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sachoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæcheheth|sæcheheth]] || [[word:sæchehej|sæchehej]] || [[word:sæchehesh|sæchehesh]] || [[word:sæchehe|sæchehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachochohoth|sachochohoth]] || [[word:sachochohoj|sachochohoj]] || [[word:sachochohosh|sachochohosh]] || [[word:sachochoho|sachochoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachohoth|sachohoth]] || [[word:sachohoj|sachohoj]] || [[word:sachohosh|sachohosh]] || [[word:sachoho|sachoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachofhoth|sachofhoth]] || [[word:sachofhoj|sachofhoj]] || [[word:sachofhosh|sachofhosh]] || [[word:sachofhof|sachofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachohotho|sachohotho]] || [[word:sachohojo|sachohojo]] || [[word:sachohosho|sachohosho]] || [[word:sachohoko|sachohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachohoth|sachohoth]] || [[word:sachohoj|sachohoj]] || [[word:sachohosh|sachohosh]] || [[word:sachoho|sachoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachohothol|sachohothol]] || [[word:sachohojol|sachohojol]] || [[word:sachohoshol|sachohoshol]] || [[word:sachohokol|sachohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachohothotho|sachohothotho]] || [[word:sachohojojo|sachohojojo]] || [[word:sachohoshosho|sachohoshosho]] || [[word:sachohoko|sachohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachohothon|sachohothon]] || [[word:sachohojon|sachohojon]] || [[word:sachohoshon|sachohoshon]] || [[word:sachohokon|sachohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachohothoro|sachohothoro]] || [[word:sachohojoro|sachohojoro]] || [[word:sachohoshoro|sachohoshoro]] || [[word:sachohokoro|sachohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
